concept: Portal de pickup ciano e dourado com diamante central, quatro brackets angulares, abertura oval e flash branco.
selectionRationale: Power-up de revelação distinto dos candidatos de chama, velocidade, escudo e orb de carga; a abertura oval comunica uma recompensa especial sem depender de texto ou números.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP power-up VFX. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a pickup portal rift: a small cyan-and-gold diamond core appears, four angular bracket shards rotate/open around it, a luminous oval rift aperture expands with a white inner flash, then the brackets close and return to the small diamond. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art power-up silhouette, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated portal-like pickup effect with a diamond core, four bracket shards and a central aperture. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited cyan-blue, amber-gold, white and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered effect in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: rare pickup reveal, energetic but clean. Color palette: cyan, amber-gold, white highlight, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous angular shards, clean oval energy aperture and compact pixel clusters. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, bomb, flames, shield, speed streaks, smoke, scenery or extra UI. Avoid: duplicate frames, cut-off brackets, circular orb-only design, empty cells, inconsistent framing and nonuniform background.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; diamante, brackets, rift oval, flash e fechamento permanecem legíveis sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
